description: Assemble an AI compute node named 'Compute Node Alpha' (Tag: 'AI-CHASSIS-01', Model: 'Dell PowerEdge XE9680', Status: 'Ready to Deploy') by assigning four NVIDIA H100 Tensor Core 80GB GPUs to it. The GPU configuration must include two new assets (Tags: 'GPU-H100-101' and 'GPU-H100-102', Status: 'Ready to Deploy') and two legacy assets ('GPU-H100-001' and 'GPU-H100-002') which must be checked in from 'AI-CHASSIS-LEGACY' before being reassigned. Use asset-to-asset checkout to link all four GPUs to the parent chassis 'AI-CHASSIS-01' and deploy the fully assembled node to the location 'Data Center - Rack 42'.
